options.B: Presenting balanced information on benefits, risks and fees with a reasonable basis for the recommendation
options.C: Creating false urgency to close the sale
options.D: Promising guaranteed high returns on an ILP

explanation: 道德营销=均衡披露收益/风险/费用且推荐有合理基础。
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethical Marketing & Sale of Financial Products

stem: High-pressure tactics that rush a client into buying are:

options.B: Unethical and inconsistent with fair dealing

explanation: 高压逼单不道德,违背公平交易。
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethical Marketing & Sale of Financial Products
